title: Access the dashboard after signing in
description: An owner can sign in and reach the main dashboard so daily operations are available.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies that a user can complete login with valid credentials and land on the main dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Book an appointment publicly
description: A client can complete a public booking by selecting a service, professional, and time slot and then see the confirmation.

steps.description: Select a service from the catalog
Fill in the name field with a valid client name
Fill in the phone field with a valid client phone number
Verify a booking confirmation is displayed

title: Create an appointment from the agenda
description: An authenticated user can create a new appointment from the agenda and confirm it appears in the schedule.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the new appointment is displayed in the calendar

title: View the dashboard after logging in
description: This verifies that the authenticated home screen shows daily metrics and provides navigation to other sections.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Update an appointment status from the agenda
description: An authenticated user can change an appointment's status from the agenda and see the updated state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the appointment status is updated

title: Open the agenda from the dashboard
description: This verifies that a logged-in user can leave the dashboard and open the agenda calendar.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the agenda calendar is displayed

title: Open an appointment from the calendar
description: An authenticated user can open the agenda calendar and inspect an appointment's details.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
View the calendar by day or week

title: Owner advances a queued client
description: This verifies that an owner can view the live queue and move a client forward to the next status.

steps.description: Select the business segment for a beauty or barber account
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Advance a queued client to the next status
Verify the queue list is displayed
Verify the client's status has advanced

title: Owner removes a client from the queue
description: This verifies that an owner can remove a client from the live queue and see the client disappear from the list.

steps.description: Select the business segment for a beauty or barber account
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Remove a queued client from the queue
Verify the queue list is displayed
Verify the client is no longer in the queue

title: Sign in and continue to onboarding
description: This verifies that a newly authenticated user who has not completed setup is taken into the onboarding flow.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the onboarding flow is displayed

title: Search and open a client record
description: An authenticated user can search the client list and open a CRM record to review the client's history.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search clients by name or phone
Verify appointment history and notes are displayed

title: See a pending reservation after public booking
description: A client can book publicly without selecting a professional and then see the reservation status shown after confirmation.

steps.description: Select a service from the catalog
Fill in the name field with a valid client name
Fill in the phone field with a valid client phone number
Verify the reservation status is displayed

title: Owner opens the finance overview
description: This verifies that an owner can access the finance dashboard and see the business revenue summary after signing in.

steps.description: Select the business segment for a beauty or barber account
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify revenue summary information is displayed

title: Owner adds a service to the catalog
description: This verifies that an owner can create a new service in settings and see it appear in the service list.

steps.description: Select the business segment for a beauty or barber account
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Add a new service with a valid name, price, and duration
Verify the new service appears in the service list

title: Review client CRM details after browsing the list
description: An authenticated user can browse the client list, open a record, and return to reviewing the CRM details for that client.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Owner edits a service and changes its active status
description: This verifies that an owner can update a service's details and toggle whether it is active.

steps.description: Select the business segment for a beauty or barber account
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Edit an existing service's name, price, or duration
Verify the updated service details are displayed
Verify the service active state has changed

title: Owner filters finance transactions by period
description: This verifies that an owner can narrow the finance transaction history to a chosen period and see the filtered results update.

steps.description: Select the business segment for a beauty or barber account
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the transaction history is displayed for the selected period

title: Owner opens the payment checkout modal from finance
description: This verifies that an owner can start a payment checkout from the finance transactions view and see the checkout modal open.

steps.description: Select the business segment for a beauty or barber account
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Show an error for invalid login credentials
description: This verifies that invalid credentials are rejected and an error message is shown on the login form.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with invalid credentials
Fill in the password field with invalid credentials

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Search clients by a name or phone number that does not match any record

title: Owner sees service validation when required fields are incomplete
description: This verifies that service creation or editing is blocked when required service fields are left invalid or missing.

steps.description: Select the business segment for a beauty or barber account
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Attempt to save a service with invalid or incomplete required fields
Verify a service validation error is visible

title: Choose the barber login path
